description: Skill Anomaly capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, behavior profiles, anomaly detection dry-runs, NeedsApproval plans, audit hook / Trust mutation plans, pack-local Approval queue writeback persistence, Approval Manager bridge planning, evidence export, and lightweight SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose skill behavior profiles, anomaly scoring, NeedsApproval planning, audit hook / Trust mutation planning, pack-local Approval queue writeback persistence, Approval Manager bridge planning, and JSON evidence export as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep skill anomaly method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.

Keep global Approval Manager enqueue, Merkle audit append, Trust Score mutation, approval release, and runtime action execution blocked until explicit downstream wiring consumes the pack-local queue record.
Let external projects import yunque-client/skill-anomaly only when the Skill Anomaly pack is installed and enabled.
